en: Come on, Truman. Who hasn't sat in the john, had an imaginary interview on Sea Haven tonight?
ko: 자, 트루먼, 화장실에서 상상의 인터뷰를 한 적이 없는 사람이 어디 있어?

en: Who hasn't wanted to be somebody? This is different. Everybody seems to be in on it.
I've been your best friend since we were seven years old, Truman.
ko: 나는 네가 일곱 살 때부터 네 가장 친한 친구였어, 트루먼.

en: Only way you and I ever made it through school was by cheating off each other's test papers.
ko: 우리가 학교를 다닐 수 있었던 유일한 방법은 서로의 시험지를 베끼는 것이었지.

en: But I always felt safe knowing that.
ko: 하지만 나는 항상 안전하다고 느꼈어. 왜냐하면 답이 무엇이든 우리는 함께 맞았고,

en: Because whatever the answer was, we were right together and we were wrong together.
Remember that time I stayed up with you all night in your tent because you wanted to play North Pole?
ko: 네 텐트에서 밤새도록 함께 있었던 그때,

en: And I got pneumonia? You remember that?
You were out of school for about a month.
ko: 너는 한 달 정도 학교를 쉬었지.
